app_ids.title: App IDs
app_ids.note: Required. A single Podio app id (e.g. "19894741") or a comma-separated list. NOTE: multi-app calls require all apps to belong to the SAME Podio space — mixing spaces returns 400 'Apps not from same space' from Podio.

include_space.title: Include Space
include_space.note: When true, the response includes the space context for each app's features.
